emails.subject: Re: HOTDOG !This is sooo adorable!
emails.body: It's really all Genia's fault, she goes to lunch too darn early. I guess we need to make a date beforehand for lunch with you...! Marie Heard@ENRON COMMUNICATIONS 10/10/2000 04:04 PM

emails.subject: Re: HOTDOG !This is sooo adorable!
emails.body: Yeh, you're right. It is her fault. In the past, she always had plans and couldn't (or just didn't want to) go with us. I guess that's the price you pay for being so popular and in demand.
